rows.notes: Consensus across all extractors for header and no amounts. Visually confirmed as centered header.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's reading of amounts (shillings: 17, pence: 10) and no pounds. gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed 17 in pounds and misread pence. gemini-flash's description is also more accurate.

Amounts (1, 7, 6) are consistent between extractors and visually confirmed. gpt-5-mini's description 'Combs' is more accurate than gemini-flash's 'Combos'. gpt-5-mini's note about the pence digit's slight ambiguity shows careful observation.
Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's reading of amounts (shillings: 1, no pounds or pence). gpt-5-mini misaligned amounts and misread pence.

rows.description: paid for flooring of Room over ye new Bursary
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms shillings: 10 (gemini-flash) and no pounds or pence. gpt-5-mini misread shillings as 1. gpt-5-mini's description 'over ye new' is more accurate than gemini-flash's 'over of new'.

rows.description: paid mr Collins in full of his first Bill of Candles
rows.notes: Amounts (21, 10, no pence) confirmed by consensus and visual check. gemini-flash's description 'mr Collins' is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Dan. Collin'.

rows.description: paid D° for lighting of Winter Lamps
rows.notes: Amounts (1, 3, no pence) confirmed by consensus and visual check. gemini-flash's description 'D°' (for Ditto) is accurate, whereas gpt-5-mini misread 'Dodd'.

rows.description: paid Cook Acct Dinner & xmas Gaudies
rows.notes: Visual verification shows amounts are shillings: 15, pence: 4, with no pounds. gpt-5-mini correctly identified shillings and pence but incorrectly added 1 pound. gemini-flash incorrectly stated no amounts. gemini-flash's description 'Acct' is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'and'.

rows.description: paid into ye Treasury Chest 200 Guineas
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's reading of amounts (pounds: 210, no shillings or pence). Both correctly interpreted '200 Guineas' as £210, but gemini-flash incorrectly added shillings and pence.
Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's reading of shillings: 1. The digit is small and faint, as noted by gpt-5-mini. gemini-flash missed this amount.

rows.description: paid mr Hornor for Battle Books, Ink & Paper
rows.notes: Amounts (shillings: 1, no pounds or pence) confirmed by consensus and visual check. gemini-flash's description 'Hornor' is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Horner'.

rows.description: paid the Cooks Bill for washing of Hall, Mops &c.
rows.notes: Amounts (3, 13, 4) confirmed by consensus and visual check. gemini-flash's description 'Mops &c.' is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'mens &c'.
Consensus across all extractors for description and amounts. Visually confirmed.
Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's reading of pence as 9. gpt-5-mini read it as 10. All other values and description are in consensus.
Visual verification confirms amounts 522, 10, 2, and a clear 'ob' symbol after the pence, indicating 0.5 fraction, as correctly identified by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini missed the fraction.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's reading of pence as 10. gpt-5-mini misread the pence as 4, although its note's attempt at arithmetic validation against its own prior readings was good. The visual evidence for '10' is strong.

rows.description: Ex Receptis que erant a D<o> Anni præcedentis
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amounts (1043, 1, 10) and the 'ob' symbol for 0.5 fraction, as correctly identified by gemini-flash. gemini-flash's description is also more accurate, specifically for 'D<o>'.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's amounts (874, 17, 10) and description ('Deductis'). gpt-5-mini misread pence and description. The row type is an 'entry' as it represents an amount to be deducted, rather than a cumulative total.

Consensus on amounts (168, 4, 9). gpt-5-mini's note correctly highlights that the visible '9' creates an arithmetic mismatch with previous totals (calculated to be 6d or 0.5d). Visual verification confirms the digit is clearly a '9', despite the arithmetic discrepancy. gpt-5-mini's description 'Dno' is more accurate.
Consensus across all extractors for header and no amounts. Visually confirmed as centered header.

Visual verification shows gemini-flash's description is significantly more accurate than gpt-5-mini's. No amounts are present. 'entry' selected for `row_type` as these are individual signatories, not general headers.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description 'Decan<o>' is accurate, representing the superscript 'o'. gpt-5-mini transcribed 'Decanus'. No amounts are present. 'entry' selected for `row_type`.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description 'J. Fortescu A. J.' is accurate. gpt-5-mini had errors in transcription ('Fortescue V. P.'). No amounts are present. 'entry' selected for `row_type`.
Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description 'J. Jonell A. M:' is accurate. gpt-5-mini misread the surname as 'Powle'. No amounts are present. 'entry' selected for `row_type`.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description 'Benj<m> Kennicott A.M.' is accurate, representing the superscript 'm' and correct surname. gpt-5-mini misread 'Henricott'. No amounts are present. 'entry' selected for `row_type`.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description 'H. Mouinsteven A. B.' is more accurate, particularly the surname ('Mouinsteven' vs 'Mountsteven'). gpt-5-mini's note on ambiguity was good, but its transcription was less accurate here. No amounts are present. 'entry' selected for `row_type`.
